videos.headline: Jaydon Blue houses a 77-yard TD
videos.description: Jaydon Blue restores Texas' two-score lead with a 77-yard touchdown in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaydon Blue houses a 77-yard TD) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's Antonio Williams does night-night celebration after opening TD
videos.description: Clemson scores on their opening drive as Antonio Williams takes the crossing route to the house.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson’s Antonio Williams does night-night celebration after opening TD) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quintrevion Wisner burrows into end zone for TD
videos.description: Texas responds to Clemson's touchdown as Quintrevion Wisner lowers his head and gets into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quintrevion Wisner burrows into end zone for TD) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaydon Blue speeds to the end zone for a TD
videos.description: Jaydon Blue flies through the hole and outruns the defense for a Texas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaydon Blue speeds to the end zone for a TD) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quintrevion Wisner cruises for his 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: Quintrevion Wisner follows his blockers and scores the easy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quintrevion Wisner cruises for his 2nd TD of the game) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas gets the INT off the deflection
videos.description: Texas' Cole Simmons goes up and snags the interception off the deflection.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas gets the INT off the deflection) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's pick-six nullified by penalty
videos.description: Clemson gets a pick-six, but a penalty nullifies the touchdown, though the Tigers keep the ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson’s pick-six nullified by penalty) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers finds Gunnar Helm for a TD before half
videos.description: Texas gets the touchdown before halftime as Quinn Ewers finds Gunnar Helm for a score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers finds Gunnar Helm for a TD before half) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik floats one to Jarvis Green for a Clemson TD
videos.description: Clemson makes it a two-score game as Cade Klubnik finds Jarvis Green for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik floats one to Jarvis Green for a Clemson TD) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson converts on fourth down to cut it to a one-score game
videos.description: Cade Klubnik scrambles and finds a wide-open T.J. Moore for a touchdown on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson converts on fourth down to cut it to a one-score game) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: T.J. Moore hauls in one-handed snag for Clemson
videos.description: T.J. Moore manages to come down with a tough one-handed catch down the sideline.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (T.J. Moore hauls in one-handed snag for Clemson) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Longhorns come up with massive goal line stop on 4th down
videos.description: Texas stuffs Clemson on 4th and goal to force a turnover on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Longhorns come up with massive goal line stop on 4th down) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning can't handle the snap on 4th-and-1
videos.description: Texas attempts a QB sneak on 4th and 1, but the snap flies out of Arch Manning's hands for a turnover on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Arch Manning can't handle the snap on 4th-and-1) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sarkisian: Ewers managed the game beautifully
videos.description: Texas coach Steve Sarkisian credits Quinn Ewers' play for Texas' first-round win over Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Sarkisian: Ewers managed the game beautifully) 2024/12/21
